# Security Checklist: Provide Health Checks and Service Metrics

**Purpose**: Validate redaction, rate limiting, and failure handling.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/031-health-service-metrics/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Health still reports when metrics storage is unreachable.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Excessive health polling is rate limited.

## Data Safety

- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Metrics output redacts PII and identifiers.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-004 Health and metrics failures are logged.
